_comment: Self-contained GitHub daemon profile. Select with `CodeReviewDaemon --review achieveai`. Reviews achieveai/LmDotnetTools through the achieveai/AchieveAiReviews cross-repo store (tool-assisted, sub-agents). Two-model split: the dispatcher/state orchestrator loop runs ReviewModelId (gpt-5.6-luna); the code-reviewer:* review sub-agents run SubAgentModelId (gpt-5.6-sol). POSTING: this committed profile is COLLECT-ONLY (EnableCommentPosting omitted ⇒ false ⇒ nothing is posted) so an accidental `--review achieveai` launch can never publish to real PRs. To run the live poster (the crd-daemon-revobot replacement) an operator sets EnableCommentPosting:true as an explicit deployment override AFTER verifying targeting/output; it shares port 5080 + the review-pool, so do NOT run it alongside the deployed daemon. Machine-specific absolute paths below; this is a fresh instance (its own .run DB) — point DatabasePath at crd-daemon-revobot/review-opus.db to continue that daemon's history.

Github._comment: GitHub CLI (gh) first-party OAuth App id + secret (public, safe to embed — same convention as LmStreaming.Sample). Required so SandboxSessionRegistry attaches the github-auth egress rule for the sandbox; the auth-webhook then injects the EXISTING stored token (crd-oauth-tokens/github.json, scopes repo/read:org/workflow/gist) for the review agent's api.github.com calls (code-reviewer:post-pr-review).

CodeReviewDaemon._comment_posting: COLLECT-ONLY by default (safe): the daemon posts host-side only when this is true. Set true as an explicit deployment override to run the live poster. ACTIVATION IS FUTURE-ONLY: turning this on posts reviews of commits reviewed FROM THEN ON — it does NOT backfill heads already reviewed while collect-only (a completed run is reused by identity and its outbox row is terminal Collected, so ReviewPoster replays a no-op). A new commit (new head) always posts fresh. Retroactively promoting already-collected heads is a deliberate requeue operation that is not yet built.
